original_goal: Phase 3A: Run real E2E delivery, fix friction, implement generated development dashboard with roadmap, subsystem maturity, validation scoreboard, staleness checks, and agent handoff.
completed: Ran real E2E delivery: start → checkpoint → session:close → prepare → validate → complete → dry-run

Fixed friction: prepare scope too strict (added policies/, .opencode/), fingerprint includes treeHash (removed), deliver-milestone.js missing SESSIONS_DIR, dev:prepare commit message shell splitting (use --file)
Corrected lifecycle flow: prepare → validate → complete (validate against committed HEAD)
Created roadmap.json with Area → Initiative → Milestone hierarchy
Dashboard shows: project state, subsystem maturity, milestone board, validation scoreboard, blockers, activity, staleness warnings
Staleness checks: active milestone without session, paused without handoff, delivered without PR, completed with blockers, stale validation, missing references, stale generated files
All existing tests pass (Phase 2C 31/31, Phase 2B 44/44, reconciliation 14/14, schemas 27/27, lifecycle 23/23, controller 11/11)
remaining: Phase 3B: Session handoff generator (structured, not just markdown)
next_required_action: Phase 3B or 3C. Dashboard is generated and functional.
